stat.title: Error-Assisted Runs
stat.subtitle: Runs scored with an error in the play.

notableEvents.label: Zach McKinstry — 3 error-assisted runs
notableEvents.detail: Top 11 · 6–2 · Zach McKinstry singles on a ground ball to right fielder José Caballero. Riley Greene scores. Hao-Yu Lee scores. Spencer Torkelson scores. Zach McKinstry to 3rd. Throwing error by catcher Ali Sánchez.

notableEvents.label: Carson Benge — 3 error-assisted runs
notableEvents.detail: Bot 1 · 0–3 · Carson Benge singles on a ground ball to pitcher Seth Lugo. A.J. Ewing scores. Bo Bichette scores. Carson Benge scores. Throwing error by pitcher Seth Lugo. Throwing error by first baseman Jac Caglianone. Throwing error by third baseman Nick Loftin.

notableEvents.label: J.T. Realmuto — 3 error-assisted runs
notableEvents.detail: Top 6 · 4–0 · J.T. Realmuto doubles (11) on a line drive to left fielder Riley Greene. Bryce Harper scores. Alec Bohm scores. Brandon Marsh scores. J.T. Realmuto to 3rd. J.T. Realmuto advances to 3rd, on a throwing error by shortstop Kevin McGonigle.

notableEvents.label: Ketel Marte — 2 error-assisted runs
notableEvents.detail: Bot 8 · 6–3 · Ketel Marte doubles (18) on a line drive to left fielder Victor Bericoto. Pavin Smith scores. Tommy Troy scores. Ketel Marte to 3rd. Throwing error by shortstop Christian Koss.

notableEvents.label: Gabriel Moreno — 2 error-assisted runs
notableEvents.detail: Top 1 · 2–0 · Gabriel Moreno singles on a line drive to right fielder Kyle Tucker. Ketel Marte scores. Corbin Carroll scores. Gabriel Moreno to 2nd. Throwing error by right fielder Kyle Tucker.

notableEvents.label: Adley Rutschman — 2 error-assisted runs
notableEvents.detail: Bot 7 · 4–2 · Adley Rutschman singles on a ground ball to right fielder Seiya Suzuki. Samuel Basallo scores. Blaze Alexander scores. Taylor Ward to 3rd. Adley Rutschman to 2nd. Throwing error by right fielder Seiya Suzuki.

notableEvents.label: Pedro Ramírez — 2 error-assisted runs
notableEvents.detail: Bot 6 · 3–6 · Pedro Ramírez out on a sacrifice fly to right fielder Jordan Walker. Nico Hoerner scores. Dansby Swanson scores. Throwing error by right fielder Jordan Walker.

notableEvents.label: Jake McCarthy — 2 error-assisted runs
notableEvents.detail: Top 8 · 4–3 · Jake McCarthy out on a sacrifice bunt, third baseman Max Muncy to second baseman Alex Freeland. Cole Carrigg scores. Tyler Freeman scores. Throwing error by second baseman Alex Freeland.

notableEvents.label: Jackson Chourio — 2 error-assisted runs
notableEvents.detail: Top 11 · 5–3 · Jackson Chourio singles on a ground ball to pitcher Ryan Thompson. Blake Perkins scores. Cooper Pratt scores. Christian Yelich to 3rd. Jackson Chourio to 2nd. Throwing error by pitcher Ryan Thompson.

notableEvents.label: Ryan Kreidler — 2 error-assisted runs
notableEvents.detail: Top 1 · 3–0 · Ryan Kreidler singles on a line drive to left fielder Yordan Alvarez. Kody Clemens scores. Royce Lewis scores. Victor Caratini to 3rd. Ryan Kreidler to 2nd. Ryan Kreidler advances to 2nd, on a fielding error by left fielder Yordan Alvarez.

notableEvents.label: Carson Benge — 2 error-assisted runs
notableEvents.detail: Bot 5 · 2–5 · Carson Benge singles on a fly ball to center fielder Lane Thomas. A.J. Ewing scores. Juan Soto scores. Carson Benge to 3rd. Throwing error by center fielder Lane Thomas.

notableEvents.label: Justin Crawford — 2 error-assisted runs
notableEvents.detail: Bot 2 · 0–2 · Justin Crawford reaches on a fielder's choice. Alec Bohm scores. Bryson Stott scores. Gabriel Rincones Jr. to 3rd. Justin Crawford to 2nd. Throwing error by third baseman Nick Gonzales.

notableEvents.label: Corbin Carroll — 1 error-assisted run
notableEvents.detail: Top 1 · 1–0 · Geraldo Perdomo steals (14) 2nd base. Ketel Marte scores. Throwing error by pitcher Walker Buehler.

notableEvents.label: Lourdes Gurriel Jr. — 1 error-assisted run
notableEvents.detail: Top 6 · 3–3 · Lourdes Gurriel Jr. reaches on a fielder's choice. Geraldo Perdomo scores. Gabriel Moreno to 3rd. Throwing error by third baseman Max Muncy.

notableEvents.label: Austin Riley — 1 error-assisted run
notableEvents.detail: Bot 9 · 10–4 · Throwing error by pitcher Huascar Brazobán on the pickoff attempt. Mauricio Dubón scores.

notableEvents.label: Mauricio Dubón — 1 error-assisted run
notableEvents.detail: Top 9 · 4–3 · Mauricio Dubón reaches on a throwing error by shortstop Masyn Winn. Ozzie Albies scores. Michael Harris II to 3rd.

notableEvents.label: Pete Alonso — 1 error-assisted run
notableEvents.detail: Top 1 · 1–0 · Pete Alonso called out on strikes. Taylor Ward to 3rd. Gunnar Henderson steals (7) 3rd base. Taylor Ward steals (3) 2nd base. Throwing error by catcher Tyler Stephenson.

notableEvents.label: Jarren Duran — 1 error-assisted run
notableEvents.detail: Top 3 · 4–0 · Jarren Duran hits a sacrifice bunt. Missed catch error by first baseman Nolan Schanuel, assist to pitcher Reid Detmers. Caleb Durbin scores. Romy Gonzalez to 3rd. Jarren Duran to 2nd.

notableEvents.label: Willson Contreras — 1 error-assisted run
notableEvents.detail: Bot 1 · 0–1 · Willson Contreras reaches on a fielding error by third baseman Curtis Mead. Anthony Seigler scores.

notableEvents.label: Colson Montgomery — 1 error-assisted run
notableEvents.detail: Top 1 · 1–0 · Colson Montgomery doubles (16) on a fly ball to left fielder Cooper Ingle. Miguel Vargas scores. Colson Montgomery to 3rd. Colson Montgomery advances to 3rd, on a throwing error by left fielder Cooper Ingle.

notableEvents.label: Chase Meidroth — 1 error-assisted run
notableEvents.detail: Bot 5 · 1–9 · Wild pitch by pitcher José Suarez. Kyle Teel scores. Tristan Peters to 3rd. Throwing error by catcher Shea Langeliers.

notableEvents.label: Steven Kwan — 1 error-assisted run
notableEvents.detail: Bot 7 · 3–3 · Steven Kwan singles on a line drive to left fielder Sam Antonacci. Brayan Rocchio scores. Austin Hedges to 3rd. Steven Kwan to 2nd. Fielding error by left fielder Sam Antonacci.

notableEvents.detail: Top 7 · 5–3 · Brayan Rocchio hits a sacrifice bunt. Fielding error by pitcher Taylor Rogers. Steven Kwan scores. Chase DeLauter to 2nd. Brayan Rocchio to 1st.

notableEvents.detail: Bot 1 · 0–2 · Throwing error by pitcher Tyler Mahle on the pickoff attempt. TJ Rumfield scores.
